body:
Stacked on `feat/sepo-preview` (#11). Minimal fix for the bug augmented-mind#67 caught. #68 intentionally held — see below.

## Concurrency race (ports augmented-mind#67)

Workflow-level `concurrency` meant a non-preview `pull_request.labeled` event — e.g. the automatic `agent` label Sepo applies — would acquire the `sepo-preview-<pr>` group and **cancel an in-flight valid preview**, then skip its own (non-preview-label) deploy. Net: the real preview is cancelled and never redeploys.

Moved `concurrency` from workflow-level to **job-level** on `build` / `deploy` / `teardown`. A run whose jobs all skip (an ignored label event) never acquires the group, so it cannot cancel an active preview.

## Why #68 (comment as the Sepo agent) is NOT included

augmented-mind#68 swaps the comment token to the Sepo app via `resolve-github-auth`. That fits augmented-mind's **non-isolated** 2-job workflow (its deploy job already checks out and runs the build). It does **not** fit this repo's **isolated 3-job split**, where `deploy` runs no PR-controlled code and carries only the audience-scoped preview OIDC token:

- `resolve-github-auth` is a local action (`uses: ./…`) → it needs a checkout in the deploy job and pulls the **high-privilege Sepo app token** into a job whose workflow a PR can modify. That *raises* the blast radius — the opposite of what the split buys.
- The existing marker-based comment already posts correctly with `github.token`; the `--edit-last` correctness bug #68 fixes does not exist here. Only the bot identity differs (cosmetic).

If we want the comment authored by the Sepo agent, the safe path is a dedicated comment job on `workflow_run` (default-branch-trusted), as part of the broader workflow_run isolation work — not pulling the app token into the PR-controllable deploy job.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

comments.body: Superseded by #11. #11 now mirrors augmented-mind's proven same-run 2-job preview workflow, which already has per-job concurrency baked in — so the augmented-mind#67 fix this PR ports is included there. (The `test-scripts.yml` changed-area path-filtering tweak bundled here is dropped with this close; happy to repropose it standalone if we want that CI optimization.)

title: Fix preview concurrency race (move concurrency to job-level)
